name: SCORCHED PEANUT BAR 45G
description:
Looking for a crunchy, nutty treat with a rich, classic flavor? Try the SCORCHED PEANUT BAR– a delicious combination of roasted peanuts and smooth toffee, coated in a layer of creamy milk chocolate. It’s the perfect snack for anyone who loves the bold taste of peanuts with a sweet twist.

The SCORCHED PEANUT BAR is a long-time favorite, loved for its crunchy texture and satisfying flavor. Each bite delivers the perfect mix of sweetness and nuttiness, making it ideal for an afternoon snack, a lunchbox surprise, or a quick energy boost on the go.

At Sweets World, we’re proud to offer classic treats from all around the globe, and the SCORCHED PEANUT BAR is one of those timeless Aussie favourites. Whether you're trying it for the first time or enjoying a nostalgic bite, this peanut bar always hits the spot.

It's also great for sharing – or keeping all to yourself! Just the right size to enjoy without feeling too full, it’s a treat that peanut lovers won’t want to miss.

Grab a SCORCHED PEANUT BAR 45G packet today from Sweets World and enjoy the crunchy, chocolatey goodness that’s been winning hearts for generations.
